seoTitle: How to Link Email to Your Wix Contact Form
metaDescription: Learn how to route Wix contact form submissions to a specific email address, with support for multiple recipients.
intro: Making sure your contact form submissions actually reach the right inbox is a basic but essential setup step. This guide covers linking a Wix contact form to your chosen email address, adding secondary recipients if needed, and testing that notifications arrive reliably.

steps.heading: Select your contact form
steps.body: Open your Wix editor and click on the contact form block you want to configure.

steps.heading: Open Form Settings
steps.body: Click the floating Form Settings button to access your notification preferences.

steps.heading: Go to Email Notifications
steps.body: Navigate to the Settings category and open the Email Notifications subtab.

steps.heading: Enter your recipient address
steps.body: Input the target email address string to link the form's intake pipeline.

steps.heading: Add secondary recipients if needed
steps.body: Optionally append carbon copy addresses to notify multiple team members.

steps.heading: Run a live test
steps.body: Submit a mock lead entry in preview mode to confirm the email delivery works before publishing.

faq.question: Can multiple team members receive form notifications?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add secondary carbon copy addresses in the same Email Notifications settings panel.

faq.question: Does the Wix Inbox sync with this email setting separately?
faq.answer: It's a good idea to check your main dashboard to make sure your connected Wix Inbox settings still mirror any changes you make.

faq.question: How do I confirm submissions are actually reaching my inbox?
faq.answer: Submit a test entry through live preview and check that the email notification arrives at the configured address.

faq.question: Can I customize the success message shown after submission?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust success message overlays and post-submission action rules from the same form settings panel.
